betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ZIRNOX§f is a graphite-moderated, CO2-cooled reactor for isotope breeding.

§eTask Requirements:§f
• §bZIRNOX Machine§f
• §bTurbines§f (x3)

§eUnique Features:§f
• Uses §bCO2 coolant§f (not water)
• Excellent for §bTechnetium-99§f production
• Can breed §bPlutonium-239§f from U-238

§eOperation:§f
• Insert fuel → generates heat
• CO2 coolant absorbs heat
• Hot CO2 → Heat Exchanger → Steam → Turbines

§eProducts:§f
• §bTc-99§f - Valuable for Technetium Steel and AE2 components
• §bPu-239§f - Fissile material for advanced fuels

§eAdvantages:§f
• Good isotope breeding efficiency
• Stable operation
• Useful byproducts

§aTip:§f ZIRNOX is your best source for Tc-99 - very valuable for progression.
